history.text: Kiribati was granted independence, completing the formal transition to sovereign statehood.
Treaty of Tarawa set new terms for sovereignty or administration.

worthSeeing.title: Phoenix Islands:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed remote protected area, one of the world's largest marine protected areas.

worthSeeing.title: Tarawa Atoll:
worthSeeing.text: Site of a crucial WWII battle and the heart of I-Kiribati culture.

worthSeeing.title: Christmas Island (Kiritimati):
worthSeeing.text: The world's largest atoll by land area, known for world-class fly fishing and birdwatching.

planningQuestions.a: Phoenix Islands, Tarawa Atoll, Christmas Island (Kiritimati).
